message:
feat(connectors): implement ConnectorErrorMapping for google-ai, homeassistant, kubernetes, and twitter

Add fcp_sdk::migration::ConnectorErrorMapping trait implementations for four
connectors, mapping AsyncError variants (Timeout, Cancelled, ChannelClosed,
Join, Runtime, ProtocolIo) into connector-specific error types with delegation
of to_fcp_error(), is_retryable(), and retry_after() to existing inherent
methods. Each connector includes a full test suite covering timeout, cancelled,
fallback, delegation correctness, retryability, and retry-after values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
